name: Goodwill
description: Premium paid during a business acquisition

name: Other Non-Current Assets / Other Investments
description: Parent account for other non-current assets

name: Deferred Tax Assets
description: Parent account for deferred tax assets

name: Petty Cash
description: Petty cash and cash on hand

name: Bank Suspense Account
description: Temporary holding for unidentified bank lines

name: Funds in Transit
description: Funds transferring between accounts or gateways

name: Trade Receivable (PoS)
description: Receivables from Point of Sale systems

name: Current Tax Assets
description: Parent account for current tax assets

name: Prepaid Tax
description: Tax paid in advance to IRAS

name: Tax Recoverable
description: Overpaid corporate tax refundable from IRAS

name: Raw Materials
description: Raw ingredients, parts, and materials that have not yet been used in production.

name: Finished Goods
description: Completed products that are ready to be packaged, shipped, and sold to customers.

name: Share Capital
description: Parent account for share capital and premium

name: Retained Earnings
description: Accumulated, distributable profits of the company.

name: Revaluation Surplus on PPE
description: Non-distributable paper gains from the upward revaluation of PPE

name: Foreign Currency Translation Reserve
description: Exchange differences arising from translating foreign operations

name: Non-Controlling Interests
description: Portion of equity not attributable to the parent company

name: Non-Controlling Interests (NCI)
description: Portion of equity not attributable to the parent company

name: Provision for Reinstatement Costs
description: Estimated costs to restore leased premises

name: Insurance Payable
description: Premiums owed to insurance providers for corporate policies,

name: CPF Withheld (Employee)
description: Employee's share of CPF deducted from salary

name: CPF Accrued (Employer)
description: Company's share of CPF owed for the month

name: SDL Accrued (Employer)
description: Mandatory employer-paid training levy accrued monthly

name: Accrued Interest Payable
description: Interest incurred but not yet billed

name: Financial Liabilities (Current)
description: Parent account for current financial liabilities

name: Invoice Factoring Liabilities
description: Cash advanced by banks against receivables

name: Interest Payables
description: Financial financing costs accrued but not yet paid on outstanding loans, lines of credit, or notes payable.

name: Provision for Reinstatement (Current)
description: Current year portion of lease reinstatement

name: Current Tax Liabilities
description: Parent account for current tax liabilities

name: Opening Stock
description: Opening Stock for the financial period

name: Trade Costs
description: Direct cost of goods or services sold

name: Tax-exempt Interest income
description: Interest earned that is tax exempted

name: Unutilised Leave Expense
description: P&L side of unutilised leave accrual

name: Upkeep of Office / Cleaning
description: General upkeep and maintenance of office

name: Approved Donations (IPC)
description: Donations to approved Institutions of a Public Character (IPCs)

name: Share of Profit/Loss of Associates & JVs
description: Parent account for share of associates/JVs

name: Under / (Over) Provision Tax in Prior Years
Undistributed Profits/Losses
description: Final equity account where the current year's profit or loss is closed.
